title: phelipanche brachypoda
intro: Phelipanche brachypoda, also known as the short-horned broomrape, is a parasitic plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Phelipanche brachypoda is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
